resources.string: We are a team of IT Students who believe in creating apps that don’t just solve problems, but also encourage positive change. Our project, Consumption Tracker App, is designed to help people become more conscious of how they use resources in their daily lives.\n
To build a future where technology empowers people to live sustainably and responsibly.
To provide an easy-to-use platform that tracks, analyzes, and educates users about their consumption, helping them make smarter decisions.

• Innovation – We continuously explore new ways to improve our app.
• Sustainability – We design with the goal of protecting resources for future generations.
• Teamwork – Every success comes from the collaboration of our team.
• User-Focused – We prioritize making our app simple, practical, and impactful.

• Russell Roi C. Llantero – Project Leader and Programmer
• Rhenzo S. De Juan – UI Designer and QA
• Aleah Mae A. Palma – Paper Works and Tester
• John Justine V. Patches – Research and Documentation
We’d love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, feedback, or need support, feel free to reach out to us:
28, Luna La Paz, Iloilo City, Philippines
